arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano confirms SHOCK transfer of Man Utd flop
arts.sum: The transfer comes after a move to Brazilian club Flamengo collapsed, opening the door for Martial to join AEK Athens. Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that AEK Athens are set to complete the shock signing of former Manchester United flop Anthony Martial .

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag handed 'new Man United deadline' as Manuel Ugarte complaint debunked
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag relieved some of the pressure on Saturday with a 3-0 victory over Southampton

arts.ttl: Man United 'set to offer new long-term deal to rising star in the final year of his contract' after impressive start to the season under Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag's men have endured a mixed start to the season after taking six points from their opening four league matches, but there have been some standout individual performances.

arts.ttl: Ten Hag Urged to Drop 170,000-a-Week Man Utd Star
arts.sum: Christian Eriksen started for Man Utd at the weekend but despite their win over Southampton, Don Hutchison has urged Erik ten Hag to drop him

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag still risks Man Utd sack despite Southampton win
arts.sum: Britain’s bookmakers expect Ten Hag to be sacked sooner rather than later, with the Manchester United boss the favourite to be the next Premier League manager to be sacked. Erik ten Hag is still at risk of the Manchester United sack, despite the win against Southampton at the weekend, according to GiveMeSport.

arts.ttl: Club chief hints at possible Liverpool & Manchester United transfer boost with “difficult” admission
arts.sum: Bayern Munich may be having some difficulties in contract talks with star player Jamal Musiala amid transfer rumours linking him with some of Europe’s top clubs, including Premier League giants Liverpool and Manchester United. arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag has the perfect opportunity to hand out a Manchester United debut vs Barnsley
